form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.05) in a P5, finishing a 5 length seventh. Has five wins and five placings from 14 starts from the draw. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 352m at this track beaten 7 lengths (20.12) behind Herbie Sure Can in a Grade 4 on April 8. Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the finish shortened in stride.
Checked entering the home turn; Commenced to give ground in the home straight.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 19.71 over 352m at this track. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.
